content.claim: Hungary faces a teacher-workforce capacity crisis: enrollment in teacher training has fallen by approximately 25% over four years, creating a shortage of 16,000 teachers, with aging workforce concentration such that half of all teachers in 2024/2025 were age 50 or older and only 7.2% were under 30, limiting redeployment capacity for structural education reform.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Implementation planning lens
limitations: Shortage figure is point estimate without confidence interval
Aging profile does not include international comparative benchmark for normalcy
Does not specify whether shortage is evenly distributed across subject areas or regions
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
